series_metadata.series_description: director's final program approval letter, NPDES draft notifications, Director`s findings and orders.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Continually maintain and update in operating area ; Paper: Retain five years in operating area destroy data deemed not useful, microfilm data deemed useful and destroy hardcopy after microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
